name: node-postcss-modules-extract-imports
title: node-postcss-modules-extract-imports
summary: CSS Modules transform to extract local aliases for inline imports
description:
CSS Modules transform to extract local aliases for inline imports
PostCSS is a tool for transforming styles with JS plugins. These plugins can
lint your CSS, support variables and mixins, transpile future CSS syntax,
inline images, and more.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-postcss-modules-extract-imports because CSS Modules transform to extract local aliases for inline imports.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-postcss-modules-extract-imports as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-postcss-modules-extract-imports with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-postcss-modules-extract-imports --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
